disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Erythema on convex surfaces with sparing of the inguinal/gluteal skin folds; no satellite papules/pustules beyond the border (argues against candidal)
trigger_question_examples: Does the rash spare the deep skin creases, or go right into them?
Are there small separate red spots spreading beyond the main rash (into the groin folds)?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It spares the deep creases and there aren't separate spots spreading into the folds.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Hydration screen — still having wet nappies, alert, not lethargic, no persistent vomiting; but feeding reduced
trigger_question_examples: How many wet nappies in the last 12 hours, and is he alert and rousable?
Is he feeding, and any vomiting or unusual sleepiness?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's still had a few wet nappies and is alert, but he's feeding a bit less because of the pain; no vomiting.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No honey-crusting/pustules/blisters, no deep spreading hot red skin, no fever (excludes bacterial superinfection/cellulitis)
trigger_question_examples: Any yellow crusting, pus-filled spots or blisters, or hot deep spreading redness?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No crusting or blisters, no hot spreading redness, and no fever.
